title: v0.1 Foundation
description: Project structure, architecture, core schemas, evidence model, and audit trail.

title: v0.2 AI SOC Inbox
description: Alert ingestion, grouping, scoring, AI triage, skeptic agent, and SOC Inbox UI.

title: v0.3 GRC Bridge
description: Control library, evidence packages, finding-to-control mapping, and risk register.

title: v0.4 Controlled Remediation
description: ActionPlan schema, policy engine, approval queue, adapters, verifier, and rollback.

title: v0.5 Knowledge Loop
description: Knowledge candidates, promotion workflow, TTL, versioning, feedback, and detection tuning.

title: v1.0 End-to-End Demo
description: Complete workflow from raw alerts to incident, GRC evidence, remediation, verification, and knowledge update.

title: v0.1.5 Agent Workflow Runtime
description: Build the Flow / Task / Step / ToolCall / Artifact runtime that powers SOC investigations, GRC mapping, remediation workflows, and knowledge review.
